meddic.metrics:
• 30% YoY revenue growth target
• Reduce manual dealer order errors (currently ~15% of orders require manual correction)
• Scale to 500+ dealer accounts without proportional headcount increase
• Dealer portal self-serve adoption: target 70%+ of orders placed online
meddic.economic_buyer:
Yemilyn Mosley — Chief Sales Officer
Decision authority confirmed. Owns budget and has driven the initiative internally. Engaged and responsive.
meddic.decision_criteria:
• Must support B2B dealer portal (tiered pricing, net terms, order history)
• Acumatica ERP integration — mission critical, non-negotiable
• Ease of use for dealers (low-friction ordering)
• Shopify Plus platform stability and enterprise support
• Competitive pricing vs. BigCommerce + custom build
meddic.decision_process:
1. Discovery completed (Apr 2026)
2. SE demo / solution validation — pending
3. LOI / intent to move forward
4. Legal & procurement review
5. Contract signature by May 9, 2026 (quote expiry)
meddic.pain:
• Current custom-built platform is years behind — no modern B2B features
• Dealer ordering is fragmented: phone, email, PDF forms
• No ERP integration — manual reconciliation between orders and Acumatica
• No visibility into dealer pipeline or order status
• Scaling headcount to support dealer growth is unsustainable
meddic.champion:
Yemilyn Mosley — Chief Sales Officer
Active champion. Driving urgency internally. Has the CSO title and ear of executive leadership. Lorena Hernandez (Digital Sales Dir) is the operational champion and day-to-day contact.

feniex.strategy:
Core play is operational efficiency + dealer experience. Feniex is growing fast but operationally constrained by their current custom platform. The ROI story is: reduce manual order processing, give dealers self-serve tools, and integrate Acumatica so their ops team stops doing manual reconciliation.

Position Shopify Plus as the only platform that can do B2B natively at scale without a massive custom build. Competitors would require significant integration investment. We have the B2B feature set AND the partner ecosystem for Acumatica.

Champion Yemilyn has urgency — she's tied this to her revenue growth goal. Keep momentum, get SE demo scheduled, move to LOI before end of April.

risks.mit: Engage certified Acumatica+Shopify partner early. Validate scope in SE session.

risks.text: Quote expiry May 9 — deal could slip to Q3
risks.mit: Create urgency around pricing lock. Schedule SE demo ASAP to keep velocity.
Shortlist 2-3 Acumatica-certified Plus partners. Present to Yemilyn before LOI.

risks.text: Lorena (day-to-day contact) may not have full decision influence
risks.mit: Keep Yemilyn looped on all key decisions. Don't let deal stall at operational level.
Jordan Carlisle handles Amazon channel — may have opinions on platform scope. Address in demo.

feniex.notes:
Victoria Forte (Shopify Executive Leadership) is available to join a call if we need executive-to-executive alignment with their leadership team.

FormSubmit trial store form is live in the MAP — follow up with Lorena to walk her through it.
